description_long: This modern bungalow features a two-story structure with a prominent dark hip roof and a mix of stone and stucco exterior finishes. The front facade includes a wide driveway, a garage with a stone accent wall, and a small landscaped area with greenery. Large rectangular windows are arranged asymmetrically, providing ample natural light to the interior. The side and rear elevations reveal additional green spaces and a continuation of the stone cladding, with minimal decorative elements for a clean, contemporary look. The roof overhangs provide shade and architectural interest, while the overall footprint is compact yet spacious. The building is designed for residential use, likely accommodating a single family.
description: A modern two-story bungalow with a dark hip roof, stone and stucco exterior, and asymmetrical window placement. Features include a garage, driveway, and landscaped green areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage with stone accent, main entrance, driveway, and a landscaped strip with greenery.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long stone-clad wall, asymmetrical window arrangement, and extended green lawn.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain stone wall, minimal windows, and a wide green lawn area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with garage side wall, driveway extension, and more green space along the base.
